code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut stopped = false

while i < n and not stopped
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let bo = string.byte_at(input, i)
      match bo
      when Some(c)
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      when None
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i >= n
    stopped = true
  else
    mut neg = false
    let first = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match first
    when Some(c)
      if c == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if c == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end

    mut val = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        let bo2 = string.byte_at(input, i)
        match bo2
        when Some(c)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        when None
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end

    if neg
      val = -val
    end

    if val < 0
      stopped = true
    else
      sum = sum + val
    end
  end
end

println("partial=#{sum}")
